## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Hardware support (new capture device, display, etc.)

## Component(s) Affected

- [ ] Recording engine (`recording_engine.sh`)
- [ ] Manager (`fitebox_manager.py`)
- [ ] Web server (`fitebox_web.py`)
- [ ] Web UI (templates / CSS / JS)
- [ ] OLED controller (`oled_controller.py`)
- [ ] Docker
- [ ] Network scripts
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have tested that recording start/stop still works
- [ ] I have tested that the web dashboard loads correctly
- [ ] My changes do not break existing Docker builds (`docker compose build`)
